prompt: Complete the three independent record utility modules. `src/group-by-status.mjs` must export `groupByStatus(records)`, returning an object whose keys are status values and whose arrays preserve input order. `src/sum-by-category.mjs` must export `sumByCategory(records)`, summing each record's numeric `amount` by `category`. `src/sort-by-priority.mjs` must export `sortByPriority(records)`, returning a new array ordered by ascending numeric `priority`, preserving input order for ties and leaving the input unchanged. Keep each function in its named module; none requires changes to another utility module.
